report_name: CISO Role Crisis: Demands, Legal Risks, and Shortages Make Position Untenable

identities.name: United States Cybersecurity Institute
identities.description: Author of a new report highlighting the crisis in the CISO role, including talent shortages, expanding responsibilities, and personal legal risks.

identities.name: Cybersecurity Ventures
identities.description: A research firm whose data corroborates the report from the United States Cybersecurity Institute, estimating a global ratio of one CISO for every 10,000 businesses.

identities.name: Gartner
identities.description: A research and advisory company cited in the report for its prediction that 50% of CISOs will also be responsible for disaster recovery by 2028.

identities.name: Small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs)
identities.description: A class of organizations highlighted as being highly vulnerable due to the CISO shortage, often having no dedicated senior security leadership.
